title: tsp.generation.completed v1
description: Emitted at the end of each TSP FunSearch generation. Source: /autobench/tsp_kernel.

best_fitness.description: Best approximation ratio this generation (higher = better, 1.0 = optimal).

gen_seconds.description: Wall-clock seconds spent generating candidates this generation (concurrent LLM calls).

eval_seconds.description: Wall-clock seconds spent evaluating candidates this generation (serial sandbox runs).

llm_requests.description: Cumulative LLM requests issued through this generation (MiniMax billing unit).

fitness_std.description: Population fitness standard deviation this generation — leading indicator of premature convergence.

code_diversity.description: Mean pairwise Jaccard code-token distance across all active programs (0=identical, 1=completely different).
